mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROJ_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PROJECTS ( PROJ_ID, PROJ_NAME, PROJ_DESC, WS_ID ) VALUES ( #{projId}, #{projName}, #{projDesc}, #{wsId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
INSERT INTO PROJ_MEMBERS (PROJ_MEMBER_ID, PROJ_ID, USER_ID, PROJ_ROLE) VALUES (SEQ_PROJ_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{projId}, #{userId}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJ_MEMBERS WHERE PROJ_ID = #{projId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM WS_MEMBERS WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId}) AND USER_ID NOT IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM PROJ_MEMBERS WHERE PROJ_ID = #{projId})
SELECT m.USER_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.EMAIL, m.PROJ_ROLE FROM PROJ_MEMBERS m JOIN USERS u ON m.USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE m.PROJ_ID = #{projId}
SELECT PROJ_ID, PROJ_NAME, WS_ID FROM PROJECTS WHERE WS_ID = #{wsId} ORDER BY PROJ_ID DESC
